messages.text: A hammer of holy force slams into you and the world goes white; you reel, stunned and unable to mount any real defence or attack.
A hammer of holy force slams into {name}, and they reel, stunned and staggering.
The ringing in your skull fades and your wits and guard return.
{name} shakes off the stunning blow and recovers their footing.
{name} is stunned and reeling from a hammer of holy force.
